title: Infosys Announces Long-Term IT Transformation Collaboration with Valmet
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic, long-term collaboration with Valmet on June 16, 2026 to modernize Valmet's core IT services and deliver end-to-end IT transformation. The engagement is intended to improve operational efficiency, reduce operational costs, optimize existing resources, and better align IT operations with Valmet's business priorities and Lead the Way strategy. Infosys will use Infosys Topaz Fabric to embed AI-driven intelligence across IT operations with a human-in-the-loop approach, and Infosys Cobalt to establish scalable, secure cloud foundations for IT modernization. No deal value or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys will support Valmet's Lead the Way strategy by helping reduce operational costs, optimize existing resources, and enable proactive management of enterprise-wide IT operations.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys will leverage Infosys Topaz Fabric to embed intelligence across IT operations using a human-in-the-loop approach for governance, transparency, and accuracy.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Valmet to Reimagine IT Operations with AI Accelerated Transformation
